text:
The critique states that no errors were found in the original answer. Therefore, the original answer is already correct and well-structured. I will present it as the improved final answer.

The 80s No. 1 hit with the song "Can't Fight This Feeling" was by the American rock band **REO Speedwagon**.

The song was released in late 1984 as a single from their eleventh studio album, *Wheels Are Turnin'*. It quickly became a massive success, climbing the charts and ultimately reaching the **number one position on the Billboard Hot 100 chart in February 1985**. This made it one of REO Speedwagon's most enduring and recognizable hits from the decade.

FINAL ANSWER: REO Speedwagon
